annotation.text: This is interesting... I like the point, and I think it's correct. I'm not convinced the plan-mode thing is an example of this. Although, where the socratic method *is* good during plan mode is in prompting the agent to explore the solution space by asking it questions about the problem space. Like--"what is the state of the art/best practices for implementing timeouts." (which is something I've had to ask claude code to look up and document as a project standard and remind it of many times (by way of asking the question, "what do project standards say about implementing timeouts?"))
